Class MvvmManager

Namespace
Crystal.Avalonia
Assembly
Crystal.Avalonia.dll

Manages View-to-ViewModel mapping and MVVM binding registration.

public static class MvvmManager
Inheritance
object
MvvmManager
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Remarks

After registering View/ViewModel pairs using this class, the system will automatically:

  • Inject the DataContext via ViewModelLocator when EnableViewModelLocator is enabled
  • Resolve the corresponding View via Crystal.Avalonia.ViewLocator based on the ViewModel type

Properties

ServiceProvider

Gets the current application's service provider instance. Available after OnFrameworkInitializationCompleted() completes.

public static IServiceProvider? ServiceProvider { get; set; }

Property Value

IServiceProvider

Methods

AddMvvmBindingSingleton<TView, TViewModel>(IServiceCollection)

Registers a View and ViewModel pair with the View as Transient and ViewModel as Singleton.

public static void AddMvvmBindingSingleton<TView, TViewModel>(this IServiceCollection services) where TView : Control where TViewModel : class

Parameters

services IServiceCollection

The service collection.

Type Parameters

TView

The View type, must inherit from Avalonia.Controls.Control.

TViewModel

The ViewModel type, can be any class.

Examples

services.AddMvvmBindingSingleton<SettingsView, SettingsViewModel>();

AddMvvmBindingTransient<TView, TViewModel>(IServiceCollection)

Registers a View and ViewModel pair as Transient mappings. Both the View and ViewModel are registered as Transient in the DI container.

public static void AddMvvmBindingTransient<TView, TViewModel>(this IServiceCollection services) where TView : Control where TViewModel : class

Parameters

services IServiceCollection

The service collection.

Type Parameters

TView

The View type, must inherit from Avalonia.Controls.Control.

TViewModel

The ViewModel type, can be any class.

Examples

services.AddMvvmBindingTransient<MainView, MainViewModel>();

GetViewType(Type)

Looks up the View type corresponding to the given ViewModel type.

public static Type? GetViewType(Type vmType)

Parameters

vmType Type

The ViewModel type.

Returns

Type

The corresponding View type, or null if not found.

GetVmType(Type)

Looks up the ViewModel type corresponding to the given View type.

public static Type? GetVmType(Type viewType)

Parameters

viewType Type

The View type.

Returns

Type

The corresponding ViewModel type, or null if not found.
